    local same = outer;
    same = same + 1;
    
    do
      local blockValue = same;
      blockValue = blockValue + 1;
      local blockValue = blockValue + 1;
      blockValue = blockValue + 1;
    end

!!! error TLUA2304: Cannot find name 'laterLocal'.
    local laterLocal = 1;
    
    local outer = outer + 1;
    outer = outer + 1;
    
    function flowForLuaLocal()
      local narrowed: string | number;
      narrowed = 1;
      local reader = function() return narrowed end;
      reader();
    end
